hero.title: We're gathering *the people building a future worth inheriting.* Be part of it.

vision.heading: The Ummah is building.
vision.statement:
The question isn't whether we'll build.
It's what we're building for.

Ummah Tech brings together Muslim technologists, founders, creatives and innovators who believe the technology should be built with purpose.

We create spaces where we exchange ideas, challenge assumptions, find collaborators and explore what becomes possible when innovation is guided by faith, purpose and service.

Because when builders find their people, they build what's worth inheriting.

highlights.phrase: guided by faith, purpose and service

conference.heading: Ummah Tech Conference
conference.body:
Every year, Muslim founders, technologists, creatives and innovators come together to exchange ideas, challenge assumptions and build meaningful relationships around a shared purpose: building technology guided by faith, purpose and service.


Because great civilizations were never built in isolation.

image.alt: Attendees networking at Ummah Tech Conference 2025
A talk in progress at the Ummah Tech Conference

benefits.title: Find Your People
benefits.body: Building can be lonely. Find founders, technologists and creatives who share your values and your ambition.

benefits.title: Challenge Your Thinking
benefits.body: Hear from leaders building at the intersection of technology, faith and impact, and leave with fresh perspectives that challenge your assumptions and expand your thinking.

benefits.title: Build Meaningful Connections
benefits.body: Meet collaborators, mentors and future partners who understand not just what you're building, but why you're building it.

benefits.title: Leave with Direction
benefits.body:
To Step Into Your Role

Leave with practical insights and renewed clarity about the unique role you can play in shaping the future.

speakers.heading: Last year's speakers.
speakers.description: A look back at the founders, leaders and builders who shared the stage at Ummah Tech 2025.

partners.heading: Our Partners
partners.description: Proudly supported by the organisations backing the Ummah tech community.

finalCta.heading: Be part of *building a future worth inheriting.*

image.alt: Ummah Tech Conference 2026 — Johannesburg, South Africa

contact.heading: Get in touch.
contact.description: Questions, speaking, volunteering or partnership — one form for all of it. Tell us what you're reaching out about and it reaches the right person.
contact.successMessage: Thanks — we've got your message and we'll get back to you soon.
